title: Senior Principal Systems Development Engineer- Python & AI, Agentic AI
company_focus:
Enterprise hardware, servers, storage solutions and systems
engineering
description:
Senior Principal Systems Development Engineer

Our customers’ system requirements are usually highly
complex. Bringing together hardware and software systems
design, Systems Development Engineering operates at the very
cutting edge of technology to meet them. We design and
develop electronic and electro-mechanical or systems-
orientated products, conduct feasibility studies on
engineering proposals and prepare installation, operation
and maintenance specifications and instructions. We’re proud
to deliver programs and products to the highest quality
standards, on time and within budget.

Join us to do the best work of your career and make a
profound social impact as a Senior Principal Systems
Development Engineer on our Systems Development Engineering
Team in Bangalore.

What you’ll achieve We are seeking a Principal Systems
Development Engineer to lead the design and implementation
of AI-driven frameworks for Compute Systems Engineering
(Servers - Rack, Tower & Edge Servers | Dell India). This
role focuses on leveraging Agentic AI frameworks to build
intelligent, autonomous solutions that enhance quality and
efficiency across our systems. You will:

- Design and implement Agentic AI-based solutions using
  frameworks like LangChain, AutoGen, and others.
- Architect and develop advanced frameworks for Dell server
  hardware and firmware portfolio.
- Drive integration of AI-driven workflows into existing
  infrastructure for scalability and intelligence.
- Collaborate with hardware, firmware, and software teams to
  define strategies and ensure compliance with quality
  standards.
- Mentor and guide junior engineers on AI-driven automation
  best practices. Research emerging AI technologies and
  apply them to improve overall efficiency and coverage.

Take the first step towards your dream career Every Dell
Technologies team member brings something unique to the
table. Here’s what we are looking for with this role:
Essential Requirements

- 13+ years of industry experience in in Servers / Storage
  Solutions and proven expertise in AI/Agentic framework.
- Strong programming expertise in Python (preferred) or
  similar languages.
- Hands-on experience with Agentic AI frameworks, including:
  - LangChain
  - AutoGen
  - Haystack
  - LlamaIndex
  - CrewAI
  - OpenAI Function Calling
- Experience with AI/ML model deployment and monitoring, deep
  understanding of LLM-based automation, prompt engineering,
  and AI orchestration.
- Experience with CI/CD pipelines, API integration, and
  workflow automation.

Desirable Requirements

- Exposure to cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, GCP), knowledge of
  containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).
- Knowledge of server hardware architecture, firmware
  components, and validation methodologies.

Who we are

We believe that each of us has the power to make an impact.
That’s why we put our team members at the center of
everything we do. If you’re looking for an opportunity to
grow your career with some of the best minds and most
advanced tech in the industry, we’re looking for you. Dell
Technologies is a unique family of businesses that helps
individuals and organizations transform how they work, live
and play. Join us to build a future that works for everyone
because Progress Takes All of Us. Application closing date:
31 Jan, 2026 Dell Technologies is committed to the principle
of equal employment opportunity for all employees and to
providing employees with a work environment free of
discrimination and harassment. Read the full Equal
Employment Opportunity Policy here.
